name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
🔥🔥Burberry latest storage bag,🥰 selected vintage plaid cotton mixed with leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, or remove the strap to create a handbag shape. 21 x 4 x 12.2 cm, 6801
